results.title: Senior Quantitative Researcher, Fixed Income Pricing | Jobflarely
highlights:
# Senior Quantitative Researcher, Fixed Income Pricing
...
- MarketAxess is on a journey to digitally transform one of the world’s largest financial markets, enabling the shift from analog, phone-based trading to a fully electronic marketplace. Why does this matter? Because our platform makes trading fixed-income more accessible, ultimately improving transparency, efficiency, and competition in the marketplace. Changing the way an established industry transacts is no easy feat. There will be twists and turns, because no one’s ever done this before. But now, more than 2,000 clients around the world rely on our solutions, and that number is only expected to grow in the years ahead. We know where we’re going. How we get there is up to us. Join us and help Take Us There.
...
- Our Quant Research team spans the U.S. and Europe and is responsible for building cutting-edge analytics, pricing algorithms, and quantitative trading solutions. We work at the intersection of data science, market microstructure, and financial engineering to deliver high-impact tools for our clients.
...
- As a Senior Quant Researcher, you will play a key role in enhancing CP+ by leveraging MarketAxess’ proprietary data and your expertise in quantitative modeling, machine learning, and fixed income markets. You’ll work on both strategic initiatives and high-impact deliverables that improve transparency, efficiency, and competitiveness in bond trading. Will you Take Us There?
...
- 5+ years of experience as a quantitative researcher within financial services.
- Proficiency in programming languages and tools commonly used for quantitative analysis and data manipulation, such as R, Python, and SQL.
- Deep understanding of fixed income market dynamics and ability to apply quantitative techniques to solve real-world trading problems.
...
- High Interest in quantitative research and pricing models.
- Experience applying advanced Machine Learning and AI techniques (Deep Learning, Tree based models, Reinforcement Learning).

results.title: SalaryPine's logo
highlights:
We are looking for a commercially minded, technically fluent product leader to own the product strategy and delivery for MarketAxess' data and analytics product suite. This role is responsible for developing and maintaining products that support business goals including revenue growth, client acquisition, and competitive differentiation.
...
The successful candidate will lead the product lifecycle across the full data and analytics portfolio, with a particular focus on two strategic priorities: leveraging MarketAxess' proprietary data assets to innovate new products and expanding distribution through modern cloud channels.
...
- Champion the use of AI and automation to improve product development velocity, production support efficiency, and client experience.
...
- Identify practical AI-enabled tooling opportunities that improve internal product workflows and team effectiveness.
...
analytics product families
...
- Partner with MarketAxess Research to explore the potential of new models and data views for productization.
- Expand the analytics product footprint beyond front-office use cases into mid/back-office, quant, data science, and risk communities to broaden the total addressable market.
...
data distribution product strategy, with
...
mandate to modernize and scale how clients access and interact with MarketAxess data
...
- Lead integration with cloud providers including Snowflake, Databricks, and AWS Data Exchange to enable scalable external delivery and open new client segments (hedge funds, quants, data scientists).
...
# What We’re Looking For
...
- 10+ years’ experience in product management within financial data, market data, analytics, or capital markets technology.
...
- Experience with cloud-native data distribution (AWS S3, Snowflake, Databricks, or similar) and modern data formats (Parquet, Iceberg).
...
- Deep understanding of fixed income markets, bond transparency, and regulatory data frameworks (TRACE, TRAX, MiFID II, CTP).
...
- Proven track record of building and scaling data and analytics products with measurable commercial outcomes.
...
- Technical fluency - able to engage meaningfully with engineering, data science, and quantitative teams without being a developer.
...
- Experience with agile delivery frameworks (SAFe or similar) in a scaled product organization.
...
- Foundational AI fluency and a genuine desire to develop deeper AI expertise.

results.title: MarketAxess AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
MarketAxess Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: MKTX) is a leading electronic trading platform operator for fixed-income securities that is strategically positioning itself as an AI company in capital markets[1]. The company has developed a comprehensive suite of AI-powered trading and pricing solutions, most notably its CP+ algorithmic pricing engine which uses artificial intelligence to provide real-time pricing for over 290,000 bonds daily[2]. MarketAxess's AI initiatives span automated trading through its Adaptive Auto-X solution, predictive analytics for price discovery, and intelligent data services that help institutional investors make faster, better-informed trading decisions[3]. The company's commitment to AI innovation has been recognized with multiple industry awards and is transforming how fixed-income markets operate.
...
## AI Hiring Signals
...
MarketAxess Job Postings Analysis
...
6.3%
...
AI Mention Rate
...
AI-Related Jobs
...
Non-Tech AI Requirements
...
Tech Roles (Engineering/Data) 4.8%
...
Non-Tech Roles 6.8%
...
MarketAxess shows modest AI hiring emphasis at 6.3% overall, with an interesting pattern where non-tech roles (6.8%) slightly exceed tech roles (4.8%) in AI requirements. Customer Service leads at 22.2%, suggesting AI integration in client-facing functions, while surprisingly Data/Analytics shows 0% AI mentions despite the company's heavy AI focus in trading technology.
...

...

...
Software Engineer Intern (Post-Trade) - MarketAxess Engineering/Tech
...
MarketAxess hiring Senior Software Engineer, Java Data Cloud Platform in New York, NY | LinkedIn Engineering/Tech
...
8 Software Engineer Marketaxess jobs in United States Engineering/Tech
...
## AI Initiatives
...
### Take Algorithm
...
Next-generation AI-powered request-for-quote focused algorithm launched in October 2024
...
The Take Strategy in Adaptive Auto-X helps clients trade with urgency by aggregating available liquidity from multiple sources including Open Trading, traditional dealer liquidity, and third-party sources like ICE Bonds. Built on CP+ with a more sophisticated pricing model than Auto-X, it offers customized targeting and allows clients to rest orders and sweep natural liquidity.
...
### Risk Calculator AI Assistant
...
Client-facing GenAI tool for document analysis and risk assessment
...
DTCC collaboration - MarketAxess' first client-facing GenAI tool that has achieved approximately 97% accuracy with zero hallucinations post-launch. The tool saves clients considerable time in otherwise highly manual document reviews for Risk Calculator usage, compressing preparation time from one week to one day and increasing productivity by up to fourfold.
...
How does MarketAxess use AI in bond pricing?
...
MarketAxess uses AI through its CP+ pricing engine, which leverages machine learning to analyze proprietary trading data, TraX market data, and public sources like TRACE to generate real-time pricing for over 290,000 bonds daily with 97% accuracy.
...
Adaptive Auto-X is MarketAxess' multi-protocol automated execution solution that uses AI-driven analytics like CP+ to automatically route orders to the best workflow (RFQ, order book, or matching protocols) to optimize execution outcomes across multiple liquidity pools.
...
MarketAxess' AI enables automation through predictive analytics that help optimize trade execution, reduce manual processes, and provide intelligent order routing. The company has seen 30%+ annual growth in automation usage over the past 3-4 years.
...
| Application | Vendor | Use Case |
| --- | --- | --- |
| H2O.ai Platform | H2O.ai | Machine learning for CP+ pricing engine and automated trading algorithms |
| Generative AI Tools | Internal/Custom | Risk Calculator AI Assistant and client-facing GenAI applications |
| Predictive Analytics | Internal/Custom | Real-time pricing, liquidity scoring, and trade execution optimization |

results.title: Analyst, Accounts Receivable | Jobflarely
highlights:
# Analyst, Accounts Receivable
...
MarketAxess is on a journey to digitally transform one of the world’s largest financial markets, enabling the shift from analog, phone-based trading to a fully electronic marketplace. The Accounts Receivable Analyst will support the daily execution of the Accounts Receivable function and assist with ongoing initiatives to improve efficiency, data quality, and automation across the AR process. Responsibilities Support efforts to identify opportunities to automate or streamline AR processes and reporting Participate in accounting transformation initiatives, including evaluating and testing AI‑enabled tools to improve productivity and efficiency Assist with preparing and issuing customer invoices in accordance with contractual terms and accounting policies Support cash application activities, including posting and reconciling customer payments Assist with collections activities by monitoring aging reports, following up on past‑due balances, and helping resolve customer billing questions Perform accounts receivable reconciliations, including reconciling the AR subledger to the general ledger Support month‑end close activities, including reconciliations, journal entry support, and variance analysis Maintain accurate customer account records and supporting documentation Partner with internal teams (Sales, Billing, Operations) to resolve discrepancies and improve billing accuracy Provide support for internal and external audits, including SOX documentation and audit requests Adhere to internal controls, accounting policies, and compliance requirements, including segregation of duties Skills Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, Data Analytics, Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, or another STEM‑related field 1+ years of relevant experience, including internships or co‑op experience Must be legally authorized to work in the US permanently without employment visa sponsorship required now or in the future Interest in or exposure to data and analytics tools such as Excel (advanced), Power BI or other BI tools, Alteryx, SQL, Python, or similar technologies Basic understanding of AR processes, internal controls, and reconciliation practices Interest in automation, data analytics, and emerging AI applications within accounting and finance Familiarity with NetSuite system is a plus but not required Benefits Hybrid Environment: Our employees enjoy a mix of working in the office and from home Free Food: We provide free lunch for employees when they are working in the office. Plus, our offices are stocked with snacks Paid Time Off: Competitive PTO package including vacation and personal days, sick leave and charity days Generous Parental Leave: Up to 20 weeks fully paid leave 401(k): Dollar-for-dollar employer match up to $17,500 Employee Stock Purchase Plan: Employees can purchase MarketAxess common stock at a discount Wellness Stipend: We provide employees with up to $1K annually towards gym memberships, home office equipment and more Onsite Healthcare: We offer convenient access to world-class care through Mount Sinai at our Hudson Yards location Tuition Assistance and Professional Development: Benefit from live and on-demand learning, role-specific training, employee-led Lunch and Learns and guest speakers Core benefits: Highly competitive medical, dental, and vision programs Company Overview MarketAxess operates electronic trading platform that enables fixed-income market participants for trade corporate bonds. It was founded in 2000, and is headquartered in New York, New York, USA, with a workforce of 501-1000 employees. Its website is

highlights:

...
### Sr Team Lead, Data Platform and Data Engineering at [MarketAxess](https://www.linkedin.com/company/marketaxess) (Current)
...
In this role I built the entire Data Platform from ground up in AWS echo system by ingesting various data sources such as Oracle, SQL Server, Aurora, Kafka etc. Also managed and built a global database engineering team for managing Oracle, SQL Server, Aurora, Mongo Atlas, Singlestore and other vendor SaS data solutions. ● Managing diverse stack of databases, including Oracle, SQL Server, MongoDB Atlas, Aurora Postgres, and Aurora MySQL across a hybrid environment (on-prem and AWS cloud infrastructure). ● Built and continue to lead Data Management Group to implement data governance rules, standardized metadata across sources, and ensure efficient access for data-centric applications. ● Architected, designed, and implemented scalable, trackable, and efficient solutions to offload historical data from on-prem to AWS cloud-hosted ecosystem, providing enhanced control, scalability and performance. ● Led development and implementation of AWS-based Data Lake solution. Consolidated data across multiple siloed systems into a centralized, real-time platform with minimal latency with AWS technology stack. ● Implemented Datadog for observability monitoring and configured integrations with Teams and Slack to enhance real-time alerting and collaboration ● Managed data processing and storage by architecting and designing Data Lake for enterprise-wide data platform. Integrated multiple sources via. ● Architected and developed Data Lineage and Data Governance solutions at enterprise level using SaS platform Solidatus. ● Oversee all aspects of AWS relationship. I'm a software engineer with professional experience in wide range of areas including IOT, ECommerce, Entertainment, Social Networking, Scientific Research, and Robotics. I love tackling interesting challenges -- particularly those involving architecture, performance, or scalability. Currently I'm part of a team that's creating an IOT device management platform that empowers business owners to easily add intelligence to and manage a wide range of devices across large portfolios of buildings.

### Senior Software Engineer at [MarketAxess](https://www.linkedin.com/company/marketaxess) (Current)
...
- an enterprise IOT platform that empowers users to manage large portfolios of buildings with disparate devices. * Created a fast / scalable API serving millions of requests daily that stores data about equipment in a format that's flexible enough to allow for representing any kind of device from any vendor, but has enough consistency to be easily understood and searched as well as emit useful events in response to changes. * Created a service that allows for interacting with disparate devices over various services and protocols in a normalized format that completely abstracts away the details of communicating with them. * Created a "rule engine" that processes incoming equipment state changes and allows users to easily set up intuitive "rules" which perform actions when certain conditions are met. E.g., "If the temperature of any room is more than 4 degrees away from the thermostat's set point for more than 30 minutes, send an email to and turn on the maintenance light." * Created an asset management service that allows for asset tagging, keeping track of which personnel are responsible for which assets, commenting on assets, maintenance schedules, warranty information, setting arbitrary reminders, etc,. ...
# Data Scientist
...
, 2026
...
- Data Scientist
- Req number:
- R7744
- Employment type:
- Full time
- Worksite flexibility:
- Remote
...
- We are looking for a motivated Data Scientist ready to take us to the next level! If you have designing, developing, and deploying state-of-the-art agentic systems, automation solutions, and generative AI applications to enable autonomous decision-making and optimize business processes and are looking for your next career move, apply now
...
Description
- We are looking for a Data Scientist - Agentic Developer to design cutting-edge AI solutions and autonomous systems focused on agentic workflows and generative AI technologies. This position will be full-time and remote.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy multi-agent systems and agentic applications using frameworks like AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, or similar
...
Use ML, deep learning, and Generative AI tools to design, evangelize, and implement state-of-the-art solutions
...
Define and implement best practices for building, testing, and deploying scalable AI solutions, with a focus on generative models and LLMs using proprietary or open-source models
...
Drive successful business outcomes by designing and building cloud-hosted Generative AI solutions
...
Work with public cloud (AWS) and on-premises infrastructure for deploying LLMs, agents, and orchestration systems
...
Evaluate, build, and fine-tune ML models and LLMs to solve complex business problems
...
Stay abreast of latest developments in agentic AI, autonomous systems, language models, and generative AI technologies.
...
- What You'll Need
- Required:
- BE, Master's or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or equivalent practical experience
...
4-8 years of overall technical experience with 0-2 years of hands-on experience in Generative AI and LLM technologies
...
1+ years of experience building agentic systems, workflow automation, or autonomous AI applications
...
Deep hands-on experience with agentic frameworks (AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, Agency Swarm, or similar)
...
Expertise in OpenAPI standards, Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocols, and Model Context Protocol (MCP)
...
Proven track record of deploying and optimizing LLM models for inference in production environments
...
Extensive experience with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex required)
...
Hands-on experience with Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker JumpStart, and other cloud-based LLM platforms
...
Expertise in RAG architectures, Fine-tuning techniques, and Prompt Engineering
...
Expert in NLP techniques and deep learning libraries (Transformer models, LSTM, BiLSTM, CNN, BERT, GPT, T5)
...
Proficiency with ML frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers, scikit-learn
...
Hands-on experience in MLOps/LLMOps including data pipelines, model training/refinement, validation, drift management, and serving
...
Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines for ML systems
...
Knowledge of monitoring, logging, and observability tools for production AI systems
...
Knowledge of reinforcement learning and agent training methodologies
...
Contributions to open-source AI/ML projects
...
Publications or patents in AI/ML domain

...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...

...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
s degree in Data Science

's degree is

preferred and will be

...
